leadText: Konikoni City (Japanese: コニコシティ Koniko City) is a coastal city situated on Akala Island of the Alola region. An isolated area of Konikoni City can be accessed from Diglett's Tunnel using Machamp Shove.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Salon 1.2 Incense stall 1.3 Massage stall 1.4 Technical Machine shop 1.5 Friendship rater 1.6 Apparel shop 1.6.1 Male fashion items 1.6.2 Female fashion items 1.7 Herbalist's shop 1.8 Restaurant 1.9 Olivia's jewelry shop 1.10 Lana's house 1.11 Move Tutor 1.12 The Ditto Five Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Salon [ edit | edit source ] The player can get their hair cut or colored at the salon near the city's south entrance. Incense stall [ edit | edit source ] A girl at the south entrance to the city sells various incenses . Incenses Sea Incense $ 2,000 Lax Incense $ 5,000 Rose Incense $ 2,000 Pure Incense $ 6,000 Rock Incense $ 2,000 Odd Incense $ 2,000 Luck Incense $ 11,000 Full Incense $ 5,000 Wave Incense $ 2,000 Massage stall [ edit | edit source ] A woman next to the girl selling incense will massage the player's Pokémon. Technical Machine shop [ edit | edit source ] A man in a stall across from the apparel shop sells TMs . Pokémon Sun and Moon TM08 ( Bulk Up ) $ 10,000 TM09 ( Venoshock ) $ 10,000 TM32 ( Double Team ) $ 10,000 TM47 ( Low Sweep ) $ 10,000 TM65 ( Shadow Claw ) $ 10,000 TM82 ( Dragon Tail ) $ 10,000 Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon TM09 ( Venoshock ) $ 10,000 TM40 ( Aerial Ace ) $ 10,000 TM47 ( Low Sweep ) $ 10,000 TM51 ( Steel Wing ) $ 10,000 TM78 ( Bulldoze ) $ 10,000 Friendship rater [ edit | edit source ] A woman standing north of the Technical Machine shop will evaluate the friendship of a selected Pokémon in the player's party. Apparel shop [ edit | edit source ] The apparel shop is located just north of the salon. It offers tops, bottoms, shoes, bags, and hats, as well as socks for female players. Blue, Purple, Gray $ 8,800 Hat Athletic Cap Beige Pink Green $ 3,200 Hat Sports Cap Legendary, Seed Poison Bee $ 3,580 Herbalist's shop [ edit | edit source ] A Hiker north of the apparel shop sells herbal medicine . Heal Powder $ 300 Energy Powder $ 500 Energy Root $ 1,200 Revival Herb $ 2,800 Restaurant [ edit | edit source ] At a restaurant south of the city's crossroads, the player can buy Z-set meals for $ 1,040. After each meal, the player receives two complimentary Heart Scales . After the player has passed Olivia 's grand trial , once a day if they order a special Z-set, Olivia will join the player and pay for both meals herself, as well as giving the player her Heart Scales. The restaurant is also Mallow 's home, with her room located on the second floor. In Pokémon Moon and Ultra Moon, after defeating Olivia in her grand trial M or becoming Champion UM , if the player enters Mallow's room during the day , they will be able to battle her at Lush Jungle . Item Location Games Heart Scale ×2 After ordering any Z-set meal S M US UM Heart Scale ×4 The first time ordering a special Z-set, after passing Olivia's grand trial (daily) S M US UM Olivia's jewelry shop [ edit | edit source ] Olivia's jewelry shop is located at the city's crossroads, across from the Pokémon Center. Olivia's room is located on the second floor. A woman at the counter across from the door sells Evolution stones . Evolution stones Fire Stone $ 3,000 Thunder Stone $ 3,000 Water Stone $ 3,000 Leaf Stone $ 3,000 A woman behind the one selling stones sells fossils , with a limit of one each per customer. Fossils Skull Fossil S US $ 7,000 Cover Fossil S US $ 7,000 Plume Fossil M UM $ 7,000 Armor Fossil M UM $ 7,000 Helix Fossil US $ 7,000 Claw Fossil US $ 7,000 Jaw Fossil US $ 7,000 Dome Fossil UM $ 7,000 Root Fossil UM $ 7,000 Sail Fossil UM $ 7,000 For female players, a third woman sells hair accessories . Type Item Patterns by availability Price S M US UM S US M UM Hair accessory Flower Barrette White, Black Red, Yellow, Orange, Pink Green, Blue, Navy Blue, Purple $ 1,700 Hair accessory Satin Bow Headband White, Black Red, Yellow, Orange, Pink Green, Blue, Navy Blue, Purple $ 4,580 Hair accessory Sea-Star Headband White, Black Red, Yellow, Orange, Pink, Beige Green, Blue, Navy Blue, Purple, Gray $ 1,800 Lana's house [ edit | edit source ] Lana 's house is located west of the city's crossroads. After defeating Olivia in her grand trial S M or becoming Champion US UM , if the player enters Lana's room in the back of the house, they will be challenged by her sisters, Twins Harper and Sarah . After defeating the twins, Lana will appear and the player will be able to battle her as well, with the battle moving to Brooklet Hill . Move Tutor [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Sun and Moon , a woman and her three Pikachu can be found in the north of the city at Lighthouse Point. When the player first speaks to her, she gives the player Pikanium Z . Afterwards, if the player brings her a Pikachu, she can teach it the move Volt Tackle , which Pikachu requires in order to use Pikanium Z and the Z-Move Catastropika . Move Type Cat. Volt Tackle Electric Physical The Ditto Five [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon , four of the Ditto Five are hidden somewhere in Konikoni City. The first spawns when the Police Officer on Route 9 asks that the player help him apprehend them. The player will encounter them in sequential order, and will need to collect their reward in order for the next one to spawn. Each Ditto always has a set Nature and IVs that complement them. Ditto # Appearance Location Nature Reward 2 Herb Seller ( Hiker ) In front of Konikoni City's Photo Club . Jolly $ 16,000 3 Chef In the kitchen of Konikoni City's Restaurant . Adamant $ 20,000 4 Iomi Iomi masseuse ( Dancer ) Next to the Konikoni City Incense shop. Modest $ 24,000 5 Olivia At the far end of the Konikoni City, looking over the ocean. Timid $ 28,000 Focus Band

sections.title: Salon
sections.text: Salon [ edit | edit source ] The player can get their hair cut or colored at the salon near the city's south entrance.
